## Checklist

- [ ] My commits are signed-off (DCO).
- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo test --workspace`.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation in `plans/` or `docs/`.
- [ ] I considered the security implications of this change.
- [ ] I considered the performance implications of this change.
